reviews.snippet: We had an amazing experience with Box and Go Movers for our last minute move from Christchurch to Balclutha. Their communication was excellent from start to finish, which really took the stress out of an otherwise hectic situation. The price was very reasonable, especially given how short notice the move was, and the team was incredibly helpful, friendly, and professional throughout. Everything was handled with care and efficiency. Highly recommend Box and Go Movers to anyone looking for reliable and stress-free moving services!

reviews.snippet: I had a great experience with Box & Go Movers. The team was on time, very professional, and handled all my belongings carefully. They made the whole moving process stress-free and smooth. Communication was excellent and the price was fair. I would definitely use them again and recommend them to anyone looking for reliable movers. Best Service

reviews.snippet: I had a wonderful moving experience, and Pavan made the entire process incredibly easy. He was professional, friendly, and very organized from start to finish. Everything was handled with care, communication was clear, and the move went smoothly without any stress. The pricing was also very competitive, which I really appreciated. Highly recommend!

reviews.snippet: This was by far the easiest move I’ve ever had. The movers were friendly, hardworking, and very careful with my furniture. They wrapped everything properly and moved quickly without rushing or cutting corners. Pricing was fair and transparent, with no surprises. Highly recommend this company box and go movers will definitely use again if needed again.

reviews.snippet: Nice and smooth experience with Box and Go movers. Booked a large item (55 inch TV) on Dec 16 from Chch to Akl, and wanted it to deliver before christmas. Box and Go responded immediately and scheduled timely pickup and delivered the item on 22 Dec. prompt communication till pickup. Highly recommend the company for logistic needs.

reviews.snippet: Having a reliable mover's assistance takes a world of weight off your shoulders whilst stressing about moving places and all the tasks that come with it. Pawan was super helpful throughout the process, even unto loading and off-loading. He was very communicative throughout the process, and helped me seamlessly transit from Rolleston to Christchurch at a very affordable price, lot lower than most competitors. Would most certainly recommend!
